mapper.sql: s.id, s.region, s.name, s.category_id, cat.name AS category_name, s.city_id, c.name AS city_name, s.area_id, a.name AS area_name, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.cover_url, s.score, s.review_count, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.status, s.tags
mapper.select: SELECT FROM shop s LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = s.category_id LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT FROM shop s LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = s.category_id LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id WHERE s.id = #{shopId} AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT name FROM dish WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
